pi_items.source: Found in setup_task.sh, export_result.sh, and the generated landing_ops_brief.txt
Export script explicitly writes output to /tmp/task_result.json.
Created dynamically in setup_task.sh via cat heredoc.
The operations brief in setup_task.sh and the verification logic in verifier.py enforce these exact parameters.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on a synthetically generated operations brief instructing the agent to set specific landing parameters (LAND_SPEED=50, LAND_ALT_LOW=1000, WPNAV_SPEED_DN=100) and save the approach plan to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/approach_landing.plan. These values exactly match the verifier logic.
